{{Infobox character
| name = Darandiel
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Darandiel]] is [[the Ghost]] and the Third [[Judge]] of the [[Abidan Court]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Darandiel]] is [[the Ghost]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1">''Dreadgod'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Darandiel]] is a [[Judge]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c1" />}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eithan]] filed his intentions with [[Darandiel]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“They’ll appreciate the help,” Eithan said, “and before you force me to answer the question, yes, I have filed my intentions with Darandiel herself.”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
